control_items.name: Accelerated Knowledge Transfer Partnerships 6 (AKT 6)
evidence_required_to_unlock: Named UK higher education/further education institution, RTO, or Catapult confirms it will lead the AKT6 application.
Authorised TTO, KTP, research-office, or equivalent lead contact confirms authority to proceed.
R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd can evidence four or more full-time employees for the business participant requirement, or an eligible alternative business partner is identified.
Written work-package, budget, business contribution, and role confirmation are received from the lead.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after every evidence item above is present: create or complete IFS AKT6 draft with the eligible knowledge-base organisation as lead and R&A/Aureon only in the evidenced role.

control_items.name: Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Feasibility studies
evidence_required_to_unlock: Named UK maritime lead or eligible collaborator confirms participation.
Feasibility partner and asset context are identified with permission to reference them.
Scope, work package, eligible-cost budget, and Aureon role are agreed in writing.
Partner commitment evidence is received from an authorised contact.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after the evidence items above are present: create or complete the CMDC7 feasibility draft using the named maritime lead/partner details and evidenced budget.

control_items.name: Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Pre-deployment trials
evidence_required_to_unlock: Named UK maritime lead confirms role and eligibility.
Vessel, port, harbour, or shipyard asset/site is identified with permission to reference it.
Trial-site permissions, safety case owner, permits, and insurance basis are confirmed or assigned.
Eligible budget and deployment plan are agreed by the lead/partner.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after the evidence items above are present: create or complete the CMDC7 pre-deployment draft using named asset/site and budget evidence.

control_items.name: Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Deployment trials
evidence_required_to_unlock: Named UK maritime deployment lead confirms role and eligibility.
Deployment asset or site is identified with permission to reference it.
Permissions, safety case, operating responsibility, and partner delivery schedule are evidenced.
Partner budget and deployment schedule are received from an authorised contact.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after the evidence items above are present: create or complete the CMDC7 deployment draft using named deployment lead, asset/site, permissions, and budget evidence.

do_not_mark_submit_ready_until: Every required route-specific evidence item is present in an auditable local or Drive/Gmail-derived artifact.
The evidence identifies authorised legal entities, named contacts, roles, budgets, and permissions where applicable.
The IFS portal answers can be completed without guessing eligibility, partner role, finance, asset/site, permit, or budget facts.
The final portal submission receives exact action-time approval for the destination application and payload.

controls: No IFS portal field was changed.
No partner invitation, upload, award terms acceptance, or final submission was performed.
This packet is an internal Aureon submission control artifact, not a representation that evidence exists.
